name: Bright Organized
tagline: Warm white business slides with burgundy headlines and blue, yellow, orange, and green accents for clear structured reporting.

palette.description: Warm white canvas grounded by deep burgundy headings, with recurring blue, yellow, orange, and green accents for badges, cards, charts, and priority markers.

typography.style: Rounded modern sans pairing; clear business hierarchy with friendly weight and high legibility.

best_for: Business decks that need to feel structured, legible, and approachable without becoming bland: company updates, operating plans, consulting recommendations, team kickoffs, marketing plans, client proposals, and training overviews. Strong when the content includes frameworks, priorities, metrics, and simple charts.
avoid_for: Very formal board materials that require restraint, luxury editorial narratives, or dark cinematic tech decks. The bright accent system can feel too energetic for sober legal, crisis, or high-stakes finance contexts.

source_inspiration.name: Bright & Organized Slides for Business Decks
source_inspiration.notes: Original HTML template rebuilt from public visual description only; not a pixel copy and does not reuse Gamma assets.
